subject: Centring Tomograms in WARP Reconstruction
body:
Hello and Happy New Year Warpers!

How do you centre a tomogram in the reconstruction using warp? 

I have a batch of tomograms, the majority of which are centred, however one 
is too low and the other is too high. I'm not sure how to tinker with the 
reconstruction parameters in general given that the command doesn't have 
too many inputs. 

This is my command: WarpTools ts_reconstruct --settings 
warp_tiltseries.settings --angpix 10 --halfmap_frames --dont_invert

Any help or insight into this would be greatly appreciated! 

Many thanks, 

Dr Katie Downes
